extraction.one_line_summary: PINOT Thibaut attacked inside final km on Tourmalet, dropped ALAPHILIPPE who limited losses to 19 seconds, defending yellow successfully.
tactical_patterns: Movistar burned Amador/Soler early controlling for Quintana, who then cracked under teammate's own pace—strategic confusion.
Bennett/De Plus paced Jumbo leadout on Tourmalet, shedding Thomas early but wasting domestique before Kruijswijk's final defense.
Alaphilippe defended yellow from front group rather than conserving in peloton—risky commitment paid with only 19-second gap.
Thomas dropped earlier than Alaphilippe on final climb despite time trial prowess—possible fatigue accumulation from defending title.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Stayed with GC climbers on Tourmalet MTF despite 1:26 yellow jersey lead, only losing 19 seconds to Pinot
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Dropped by own team's Soler/Amador pace on Tourmalet despite Movistar controlling—form clearly insufficient
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Lost contact before final kilometer on Tourmalet, dropped 35 seconds while holding second GC—defending champion struggling
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: positive: Hung with Pinot/Alaphilippe group until finale, only 20 seconds down—unexpectedly strong climbing for third on GC
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Dropped early on Tourmalet after already struggling on Col de Soulor—completely out of GC contention
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: Distanced before Goudou's acceleration even began—no longer climbing at required level for podium support
